div.head: The Consul General at Peiping (Clubb) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
1611. Chinese People’s PCC opened evening meeting September 21 with 636 delegates, alternates, specially invited delegates representing 45 units attending. Mao’s opening speech (reported [by] NCNACommunist New China News Agency. September 21) stated PCC “declares that it exercises the functions of National People’s Congress”, PCC thus, in fact, acting as ad interim governing body, will enact powers and function of All-China People’s Congress before calling of Congress. Other opening session speeches by Liu Shao-chi,Vice Chairman of Central Committee of Chinese Communist Party. Madame Sun Yat-sen,Sister of Madame Chiang Kai-shek, Mrs. H. H. Kung, and T. V. Soong. Ho Hsiang-ning (Madame Liao Chung-kaiWidow of leftist leader of the Kuomintang (Nationalist Party) before his execution in 1925.) of KmtKuomintang. Revolutionary Committee, Chang Lan
(CDL), Kao Kang (new People’s Government),Chairman of “People’s Government of the Northeast” since August 1949. Chen YiCommunist mayor of Shanghai. (PLACommunist People’s Liberation Army.), Huang Yen-pei (Democratic National Construction Association), Li Li-san (ACFL), Sai Fu-tingLeader of Hi uprising in northwest Sinkiang, 1944. (Sinkiang), Chang Chih-chungFormer Chinese Governor of Sinkiang and Military and Political Affairs Director for Northwest China. and Cheng Chi-sen (specially invited delegates), and Ssu-tu Mei-tang (Overseas China). Liu and Mme. Sun speeches complete in NCNA broadcast September 22. Other speeches summarized in NCNA September 22 and Contel 1605, Sept. 24.Latter not printed.
Praesidium of PCC is composed 89 members as listed NCNA September 22. Secretary-General is Lin Tsu-han.
Sent Department 1611, repeated Shanghai 1003; by mail Tientsin.
